response.overview: An exclusive look behind the scenes at Philosophy Tube, an educational web channel about philosophy, created by Abigail Thorn. From starting out filming herself in her parents' bedroom to an audience of over a million, Abigail has created a platform that both educates and entertains, by combining her expertise in philosophy and a passion for theatre. This candid interview details the history of the channel, her creative process in bringing it to life, and her hopes and fears for the future of content creators.
response.tagline: An exclusive look behind the scenes at Philosophy Tube, an educational web channel about philosophy, created by Abigail Thorn.
response.title: Making Philosophy Tube
